scripts.build: npm --prefix luxor-hub install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix luxor-hub run build && rm -rf dist && cp -r luxor-hub/dist dist
scripts.build:dev: npm --prefix luxor-hub install --no-audit --no-fund && (cd luxor-hub && npx vite build --mode development) && rm -rf dist && cp -r luxor-hub/dist dist
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix luxor-hub install && rm -rf luxor-hub/dist && npm --prefix luxor-hub run build
scripts.smoke:playwright: cd luxor-hub && npx tsx scripts/playwright-smoke.ts http://localhost:8080/
scripts.smoke:all: npm run build && npm run smoke:urls && npm run smoke:health
scripts.test:ci: npm run validate && npm run preflight && npm run ci:dry-run && npm run smoke:urls
